data: {"generalSituation":"Under the influence of the northeast monsoon, the weather will be mainly fine over the coast of Guangdong tomorrow. It will be dry during the day. A strong easterly airstream will affect the region over the weekend. The monsoon is expected to persist over southern China early to midweek next week. It will be slightly cooler over the region. Meanwhile, a band of clouds will cover the region early next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260306","week":"Friday","forecastWind":"North to northeast force 4, becoming east force 4 to 5 at night.","forecastWeather":"Mainly fine.
